title: doctor_findings
description: Schema for the doctor static-phase stdout output. Wraps a list of Finding entries (one per check per spec tree). Distinct from proposal_findings.schema.json (which is the propose-change/critique template-output schema).

findings.description: All findings from the orchestrator pass. Empty array means doctor ran zero checks (an unusual state worth investigating in itself); a non-empty array with all status='pass' means a clean run. Any status='fail' triggers exit 3.
